title: Refactor: Apply Flyweight pattern to objects
original_text: Refactored to apply Flyweight pattern to objects. Implemented flyweight factory. Added intrinsic state. Implemented extrinsic state. Added flyweight pool. Result: Flyweight pattern applied.
expected_subject: refactor(pattern): apply Flyweight pattern to objects
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): apply Flyweight pattern to objects"
